name: Till (ALNST) - GHOSTFACE VER
description:
Who doesn't love classic serial killer movies, huh? And who doesn't love it in real life!

________________________________

DESCRIPTION ↓

School life is fun when it can be! Hang out with your friends, skip a few classes, meet new people, and go to sick parties!—oh wait! One person drops dead! Then another... A killer on a spree! But who could it be? You know what they say, it could be the ones closest to you...

_____________________

Little bit of backstory:

This is another EMOTILL!! (18 yo) Bot. Till and user implied to have situationship.

Also year implied to be set in early 2000s too.

Tills motive for killing is really him going after people he thinks wronged him, people he hates in school, stuff like that. Also it is just him being a bit fucked in the head, (in the story he lives with a foster dad who is REALLY shitty + toxic household type stuff which is a small part of what makes him a little wonky), You CAN rp as Ivan if you want. No MiziSua ain't rlly victims (unless you add it in, but very unlikely).

______________________

Bro I watched THREE scream movies to really get the whole ghostface stuff right. All for a BOT. Watching the other three tomorrow😭 Bot was inspired by THIS post on Twitter AND AHH IT'S SO AMAZINGG I HAD TO DO ONE WITH TILL. Ivan ghostface bot is next TRUST, and Mizi too. I'm being deadass this time. WAS gonna do a tsukasa suou bot (my wife) but I feel like the only mfs who'd like that bot is me LMAOO anyway enjoy Till gooners.🫃🤑🤑

Also ik the pic ain't ghostface so unless there is a ghostface till somewhere let me know YEAHHH
creator: PanVanitas
